flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Antelope Valley Community College District rose 57% between 2007 and 2010 ($3.5k → $5.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Antelope Valley Community College District rose 37% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.0k → $9.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Antelope Valley Community College District fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (5.1% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Antelope Valley Community College District rose 44% between 2007 and 2010 (8.7k → 12.5k).
